originalTitle: Live Dev - PufferLib is Fixing Reinforcement Learning
title: Analyzing Hyperparameter Sweeps and TLDDR Diversity Algorithm on Snake Environment
summary: Analyzed hyperparameter sweep results for PufferLib experiments, comparing best runs and evaluating the TLDDR diversity algorithm on a snake environment. Discussed the stability and directional bias of trained policies, and identified the need for more complex environments to further validate algorithmic improvements.
